figure.title: Large Block Write Straddling a Beat Boundary
figure.purpose: Shows a large contiguous write block that starts near the end of one beat and extends fully across a second beat.

technical_summary: ReqAddr starts at DW14 in BEAT 0.
ReqLen covers the remainder of BEAT 0 and extends all the way through DW15 of BEAT 1.
All byte enables within the active range are '1', indicating a full block write.

packet_layout.description: First data beat containing the beginning of the block write
Second data beat containing the continuation of the block write

critical_facts: Large contiguous writes can span multiple beats seamlessly, with all intermediate byte enables asserted.
